disabled_reason: 2026-05-30: Calibration map fitted on only 304 Qwen3 / 99 Ministral samples with incomplete outcomes. The 0.6-0.8 bin (dominant output mode for both models) was mapped to 28.9% / 23.5% p_correct, effectively muting both signals to near-100% HOLD. Reverted to raw confidence passthrough. Re-fit when outcome backfill is complete and min_bin_count >= 500.
